stepBody:
The encoded message below contains the single letter U, used as a whole word. 
Using common-word reasoning, identify which plaintext letter U is most likely to stand for. U JCYWY IZ NYRN YHWLSJNYX CH U BYVLYQ PYLMCIH IZ NBY WUYMUL WCJBYL CM MIGYNCGYM ZIOHX IH NBY VUWE IZ DYQCMB GYTOTUB MWLIFFM
